creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-05-31 18:26:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/photo_gallery    Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Convert to USE_APACHE, remove apache from _DEPENDS-
  - Use WWWOWN, WWWGRP
  - APACHEDIR comes from USE_APACHE
  - Use %%var%% in pkg-plist
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/134601
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (2 weeks)
  Submitted by:   me
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +7 -9      ports/www/photo_gallery/Makefile
  1.3       +5 -5      ports/www/photo_gallery/pkg-plist
